expression.label: Text3
expression.exp:
"max. cable force: N_{max} = N_{9} = " + (round((n_2 * scaleForceDiagram))) + "kN
forces in pylons & back stays:
N_{1} = A = " + (round((j_4 * scaleForceDiagram))) + " kN N_{2} = B = " + (round((k_4 * scaleForceDiagram))) + " kN N_{10} = C = " + (round((b_5 * scaleForceDiagram))) + " kN N_{11} = D = " + (round((a_5 * scaleForceDiagram))) + " kN"

caption.val: show reaction forces in force diagram
